# Robetix

> Robetix is a robotics and embedded systems engineering company based in Pakistan, serving clients in 12+ countries worldwide.

## About

Robetix designs and builds UAV drone systems, Edge AI solutions, custom PCBs, ROS 2 autonomous robots, and embedded firmware. Founded by engineers with published research experience and a track record of delivering real hardware to international clients. Team of 10 engineers covering the full stack from mechanical design to software deployment.

## Services

- UAV & Drone Systems (Pixhawk, ArduPilot, MAVLink)
- Edge AI & Computer Vision (YOLOv8, TFLite, OpenCV)
- ROS 2 & Autonomous Robots (SLAM, Nav2, Gazebo)
- PCB Design & Prototyping (KiCad, Altium)
- Embedded Firmware (ESP32, STM32, FreeRTOS)
- CAD & Mechanical Design (Fusion 360, SolidWorks)
- Custom Robotics Projects (End-to-End)

## Founders

- Shah Zaman Haider — Founder & Lead Engineer. Robotics & IoT Systems Integrator, Did Bachelors in Intelligent Systems & Robotics, published researcher, ex-Research Intern at NCAI NUST Islamabad.
- Malik Zain Haider — Co-Founder & Hardware Engineer. Student of Intelligent Systems & Robotics. Mechanical design, PCB layout, and Computer Architecture specialist.

## Key Projects

- Autonomous SAR Hexacopter — F500 frame, Pixhawk, Raspberry Pi 5, YOLOv8 person detection, MAVLink, custom browser-based GCS
- Indoor Autonomous Navigation with SLAM, ROS 2, published in peer-reviewed conference
- Custom Motor Controller — Bare-metal STM32, custom PCB, FOC
- Real-Time Object Detection on ESP32-CAM — TFLite, sub-50ms inference
- Designed and modeled a 6 Degrees-of-Freedom (6DOF) industrial manipulator in Autodesk Fusion 360
- Designed 8, 16 and 32 bit computer architectures in logisim.
